title: Cod Stew Niçoise
description: A hearty and flavorful French-inspired stew made with cod, rustic potatoes, and Norwegian ingredients.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the cod fillets and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the cod from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the white wine to the pot and cook until reduced by half, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the fish stock, tomato paste, and smoked salmon to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the rustic potatoes to the pot and cook until they are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Return the cod fillets to the pot and cook until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the cod stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
